notes: Beta evidence bundle for the v0.2.0 line. RC-branch CI and smoke runs are in progress (triggered by push to rc/v0.2.0). Production-only gates are documented with current status; full production evidence is required before RC or production promotion. Tracking issue: #150.
freeswitch_smoke_run_url: PENDING — rc/v0.2.0 smoke run triggered on push to rc/** branch; update this field with the passing run URL from the self-hosted runner (issue #137)

rc_branch_procedure.step_4: GitHub Actions triggers freeswitch-smoke.yml on rc/** branch (self-hosted runner)
rc_branch_procedure.step_5: Confirm FreeSWITCH runtime smoke status check passes on rc/v0.2.0
rc_branch_procedure.step_6: Update freeswitch_smoke_run_url with the passing run URL
rc_branch_procedure.step_7: Update ci_run_url, codeql_run_url, coverage_run_url, docker_images_run_url with rc-branch run URLs

production_preflight: pnpm production:preflight passes check-config. Fails in dev (10 items, all missing production env vars — expected). Target-environment validation required before production RC — tracked in open-release-blockers.md.
production_e2e: Smoke run 26803056139 included full production E2E: tenant registration, extension create, directory/dialplan lookup, IVR lifecycle (validate/simulate/publish), inbound route publish — all passed. RC-branch E2E artifact will be produced by the rc/v0.2.0 smoke run in progress. Production RC evidence must reference the rc-branch smoke artifact.
production_soak: Lab soak evidence: 1800s run, 0% error rate, p95 8.78ms, p99 12.05ms (PR #116, issue #100). Production RC evidence requires soak from the target release topology — tracked in open-release-blockers.md.
production_slo: Lab SLO evidence: directory lookup p95 12.8ms, dialplan lookup p95 17.19ms — below 50ms breach threshold (PR #116, issue #100). Production RC evidence requires SLO validation from the target release topology — tracked in open-release-blockers.md.
restore_smoke: Restore rehearsal evidenced in PR #116 (issue #98): pg_dump, restore to temp DB, migrations, db:contracts, db:constraints, restore:smoke all passed. RC-environment restore rehearsal required before production — see docs/ops/backup-restore.md and docs/ops/upgrade-rehearsal-evidence.md.
rate_limit_topology: pnpm production:rate-limit-check passes with 4 warnings (explicit production RATE_LIMIT_* values not set in dev — expected). Redis-backed rate-limit store is implemented (migration 0028). Multi-instance topology validation required before production — tracked issue #139, docs/ops/rate-limit-topology.md.
carrier_interop: FusionPBX/NetGSM live interop — docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json: sip_register PASSED (REGED on ivr.velocize.com), bidirectional SIP INVITE signaling confirmed, FreeSWITCH CDR written, inbound INVITE received with real NetGSM caller-ID (+903124401820). Closes #138.
5 scenarios documented as exceptions requiring live carrier re-test before production carrier traffic (see docs/ops/carrier-interop.md).
security_review: CodeQL: https://github.com/gokbilge/manageCallAI/actions/runs/26821054642 (clean, no open high/medium alerts). FreeSWITCH hardening check passes (0 findings). Log redaction: 20/20 test cases pass. Full telecom threat model and production security review required before production RC — tracked in open-release-blockers.md.

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: Beta candidate signoff. Production RC and production promotion require a separate operator signoff after all production gates pass.

beta_gate_status.observability_hud: implemented — live cockpit with active sessions, queues, runtime errors, FreeSWITCH node health panel; candidate UI evidence in docs/release/product-release-audit.md
beta_gate_status.webhook_signing: implemented and integration-tested — HMAC-SHA256 signing, replay protection, DLQ, idempotency; docs/design/webhooks.md; CI passes
beta_gate_status.n8n_workflows: 10 workflow templates documented in docs/ops/n8n-setup.md; end-to-end import/run proof required for beta-ready promotion (issue #133)
beta_gate_status.mcp_capability: 16 tools, drift checks pass in CI; setup guide at docs/ops/mcp-setup.md; end-to-end capability proof required for beta-ready promotion (issue #134)
beta_gate_status.sdk_dry_run: SDK generate workflow exists; latest publish workflow run failed — dry-run/publish evidence required for beta-ready promotion (issue #135)
beta_gate_status.coverage: API 64% / Web 80% / MCP 85% — beta exception for API documented (integration-only paths require live FreeSWITCH); 70% target before beta-GA; 80% before RC (issue #141)

production_gate_status.upgrade_rehearsal: template documented at docs/ops/upgrade-rehearsal-evidence.md; execution required before production — issue #140
production_gate_status.sip_tls_srtp_nat: historical evidence from smoke run 26803056139 at docs/ops/sip-tls-srtp-nat.md; RC-topology evidence required before production — issue #92
production_gate_status.token_rotation: check:runtime-token-rotation passes; rotation rehearsal evidence required for production — issue #94
production_gate_status.log_redaction_artifact: check:log-redaction passes (20/20); sanitized log artifact from target deployment required for production
production_gate_status.retention_storage: retention API + worker implemented; object-storage cleanup and export-before-delete evidence required before production — issue #136
production_gate_status.network_hardening: docs and check-config pass with 4 NAT/RTP/SRTP warnings (expected in dev); target deployment validation required — issue #93
production_gate_status.fraud_controls: outbound policy API and integration tests implemented; carrier-level block/allow proof required before production
production_gate_status.rate_limit_multi_instance: Redis store implemented; topology proof required for multi-instance deployments
production_gate_status.release_bundle_complete: this manifest will be validated with pnpm release:evidence-check once rc-branch smoke URL and CI URLs are updated
